basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Recruitment 2026: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani has released the official notification for Junior Research Fellow posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/M.Tech/M.Sc in Computer Science, AI/ML, Data Science, Cognitive Science, Neuroscience.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: B.Tech, M.Tech, or M.Sc in Computer Science, AI/ML, Data Science, Cognitive Science, or Neuroscience. Experience with Unity/Unreal Engine, VR/AR, or interactive game development and knowledge of Autism Spectrum Disorder and working with children/adolescents will be given opportunity.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 37,000 per month for five years.

selection_process: Email detailed curriculum vitae Online interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at BITS Pilani?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position is 20th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Tech, M.Tech, or M.Sc degree in relevant fields like Computer Science, AI/ML, Data Science, Cognitive Science, or Neuroscience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month for a duration of five years.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to the principal investigator at [email protected].

faq.question: Q5. Is there any specific experience preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Experience with Unity/Unreal Engine, VR/AR, or interactive game development, along with knowledge of Autism Spectrum Disorder and working with children/adolescents, will be advantageous.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves submitting a detailed curriculum vitae via email, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment, and the position is for a Junior Research Fellow for a specific project duration.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the BITS Pilani Goa Campus located?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the BITS Pilani, K K Birla Goa Campus.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age limit restrictions for this application?
faq.answer: Specific age limits are not detailed in the provided summary; candidates are advised to check the official notification for any age criteria.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with your application.
